Bloom of Depths

Triggers: 3 sec

Shackles of the Earth
The unit increases all stats for self and 2 random allied units by 20% for 3 sec. The unit also turns 2 random enemy units into rocks for 3 sec. For that duration, targets are unable to move, take 40% more damage, and receive 182400 magic damage every second. When the effect wears off, the targets explode, receiving 233600 pure damage, and their physical and magic armor is reduced by 20% for 3 sec. 2 nearby enemies are also hit by rocks. When they hit, they deal 182400 physical damage to the targets, and stun them for 2 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
